---
title: "test_odin_logic.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_odin_logic.py"
loc: 21
complexity: 1
logic_score: 7.77
style_score: 3.63
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.91
---

## Intent
The `test_odin_logic.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_calculate_effective_stats_basic, test_calculate_effective_stats_synergy, test_get_combat_rating. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_calculate_effective_stats_basic, test_calculate_effective_stats_synergy, test_get_combat_rating. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.logic](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.logic)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.models](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.models)

### Exports
- `test_calculate_effective_stats_basic`
- `test_calculate_effective_stats_synergy`
- `test_get_combat_rating`
